title: US-Iran talks pause without breakthrough: 5 reasons why negotiations failed in Pakistan
summary_full: US-Iran nuclear talks in Islamabad concluded without a deal after 21 hours, with deep divisions over nuclear commitments, sanctions relief, and regional control preventing a breakthrough. Both sides indicated future discussions, but significant disagreements over enrichment, frozen assets, and maritime security remain.
